name: Bodhon
overview: When second-year college student Shinjini gets raped, her professor, Raka Sen, emerges as the only ray of hope at a bleak time. Bodhon is the story of one woman standing up for another woman in a society where a woman is always at fault.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Bodhon (বোধন) 2 | Sandipta Sen | Aditi Roy | 22nd December | hoichoi
